title: Documentation source-map cleanup
task: Clean up stale documentation links after moving examples into a new folder.
context: Readers need source links that still point to the files behind the published docs.

route.path: Docs / Source map > Link integrity > Public docs
route.reason: Documentation owns the reader-facing shape; spec mining finds stale source assumptions, and QA defines link checks.

omitted_skills.reason: No API contract is being designed.
The site layout is not the main defect.
